plan.failureSummary: Deterministic execution failed because the cached selectors for 'Select your occupation' did not match the currently served form set (Set 1), which contains 'Age Group' instead.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai deterministic cache and retry the automation run. This forces the LLM to dynamically adapt to the active form layout.

plan.notes: The website serves dynamic form layouts (e.g. Set 1 vs. Set 2), as shown by the '[Set 1]' indicator in the failure screenshot and the alternating success/failure pattern in flowHistory. When deterministic mode is active, page.ai tries to replay cached selectors from a different set, causing a mismatch. Since the overall objective ('Fill out the all of the survey questions with fake data...') is semantically flexible, clearing the cache will allow page.ai to dynamically adapt to the currently served layout.
